name: Jackpot Pawnshop
description_short: Jackpot Pawnshop in Fraser, Michigan offers pawn loans, gold/jewelry buying, and resale of electronics, tools, and luxury items with no credit check required.
description_long:
Jackpot Pawnshop operates as a traditional pawn shop located in Fraser, Michigan, between 14 and 15 Mile on Groesbeck Highway. The business functions as both a lender (providing collateral-based cash loans) and a retailer of second-hand and new merchandise. According to their website, they pride themselves on being a local alternative to traditional lending, emphasizing speed and accessibility for customers who need immediate cash.

The shop offers pawn loans secured by personal property with no credit checks required, along with the ability to sell used items directly for cash. Their inventory spans multiple categories including smartphones (iPhone, Samsung Galaxy), video game consoles (Xbox One, PlayStation 4), power tools (Bosch, DeWalt, Milwaukee), jewelry and watches, televisions, smart home devices, and construction equipment. They specifically advertise buying gold and silver jewelry and claim to carry over 500 televisions. They also offer phone compatibility testing at no extra charge for customers bringing their SIM cards.

Jackpot Pawnshop differentiates itself through inventory depth (particularly in tools and electronics), stated competitive pricing compared to competitors, and customer service examples highlighted in Google reviews. They position themselves as "Fraser's Premier Pawnshop" and actively encourage customers to verify their reputation online. Customer reviews mention friendly staff, good selection of specialty items like Snap-On tools, and willingness to accept items other shops reject.

The business model is straightforward: pawn loans are short-term, collateral-based financing with interest rates that vary by item and loan term (rates not disclosed on website). Their resale model depends on continuous inventory turnover. Like all pawn shops, they operate on the assumption that some borrowers default, allowing them to resell collateral at profit. Customers should understand this is not a conventional lender and carries inherent transaction costs reflected in pawn rates and retail markups.
pros: No credit check required for pawn loans, enabling access for those with poor or no credit history
Immediate cash availability—typical pawn transaction model provides same-day funding
Extensive inventory of electronics, power tools, and luxury items at claimed below-market prices
Willingness to buy items other pawn shops reject, as noted in customer reviews
Free phone compatibility testing service when customers bring SIM cards
Specialized in high-demand resale items (gaming consoles, smartphones, Snap-On tools, watches)
Positive customer reviews highlighting good service and competitive pricing
cons: Interest rates and loan terms not disclosed on website, making APR comparison impossible before visiting
Pawn loans are short-term by nature, requiring repayment or item forfeiture within weeks/months—not suitable for long-term borrowing
Selling items to pawn shops typically yields significantly less than retail or online resale value
Risk of losing personal property of sentimental value if unable to repay loan plus interest and fees
Limited transparency about loan-to-value ratios and specific rate structures compared to other lenders
best_for: People with no credit or poor credit history needing emergency cash without a credit check
Those looking to quickly liquidate used electronics, tools, or jewelry for immediate payment
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking discounted second-hand electronics, power tools, or gaming equipment
Individuals needing short-term collateral loans who can reliably repay within the standard pawn timeframe
diagnosis: Jackpot Pawnshop is best for customers with no credit history or poor credit who need immediate cash and are willing to pledge personal property as collateral, or bargain hunters seeking discounted electronics and tools. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are expensive short-term financing (rates undisclosed) and not suitable for longer-term borrowing needs; additionally, selling items to pawn shops yields significantly below market value compared to other resale channels.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based short-term cash loans with no credit check)
Buying and selling of used jewelry, gold, and silver
Purchase and resale of smartphones (iPhone, Samsung Galaxy, LG, AT&T, Verizon, MetroPCS, Sprint, Simple Mobile)
Video game console sales (Xbox One, PlayStation 4, games, controllers, VR headsets, accessories)
New and used power tool sales (Bosch, DeWalt, Milwaukee, Snap-On cordless kits and single tools)
Television sales (over 500 smart TVs, LED, LCD, Plasma, including 4K Blu-Ray players)
Smart device sales (Roku, Amazon Alexa, Nest Thermostats, Apple Watches, Samsung Gear)
Phone compatibility testing with customer's SIM card at no charge
Heavy duty construction equipment sales (construction lights, generators, protection equipment)
Jewelry sales (rings, bracelets, necklaces, Rolex, Brighton, Tag Heuer watches)
In-store showroom browsing of inventory at Fraser location
